sections.paragraph:
στρατιά, ᾶς, ἡ [cp. στρατός ‘army’] ‘a formation of entities on a large scale’

—a. w. focus on military aspect and display of cosmic authority army Lk 2:13.

—b. collectively of celestial bodies viewed as an army of deities commanding worship host Ac 7:42. In 2 Cor 10: 4 v.l. σ. = στρατεία s. above.
